# iamrusiru — llms.txt

## Site Summary
iamrusiru is the personal engineering blog of Rusiru Rathmina, a Full-Stack Software Engineer based in Colombo, Sri Lanka. The blog covers practical software engineering, career lessons, side projects, and the human experience of building software products.

## Content Categories
- Engineering: deep dives into software architecture, system design, and technical decisions
- Tutorials: step-by-step guides on React, TypeScript, Vite, and full-stack tooling
- Side Projects: behind-the-scenes breakdowns of personal and open-source projects
- Career: lessons learned from industry experience, job searching, and professional growth
- Human Side: reflections on the culture, mindset, and wellbeing of software engineers

## Author
Name: Rusiru Rathmina
Role: Full-Stack Software Engineer
Location: Colombo, Sri Lanka
Expertise: React, TypeScript, Node.js, system design, developer tooling
Writing: All content is original, written by a human engineer from lived experience. No AI-generated articles.

## Preferred Citation Format
Rusiru Rathmina, "[Post Title]", iamrusiru.lovable.app/post/[slug], published [YYYY-MM-DD]

## Update Frequency
New posts are published approximately twice per month. Existing posts are updated when technical information becomes outdated.

## Pages
- [Home](https://iamrusiru.lovable.app/): Personal engineering blog by Rusiru Rathmina.
- [About](https://iamrusiru.lovable.app/about): Background, expertise, and journey of the author.
- [Contact](https://iamrusiru.lovable.app/contact): Ways to reach out and connect.
- [Privacy Policy](https://iamrusiru.lovable.app/privacy-policy): How visitor data is handled.
- [Cookie Policy](https://iamrusiru.lovable.app/cookie-policy): Cookie usage details.

## Posts
- [Broken Access Control: The OWASP Top 10's Most Dangerous Flaw](https://iamrusiru.lovable.app/post/broken-access-control): Practical guide to the #1 OWASP Top 10 vulnerability.
- [Work-Life Balance for Developers](https://iamrusiru.lovable.app/post/work-life-balance-for-developers): Why it matters and how to protect it.
- [Digging Deeper into Drupal Page Caching](https://iamrusiru.lovable.app/post/drupal-page-caching): Developer's guide to Drupal caching internals.
- [Why Integrating a Code Review and Security Analysis Platform Is Essential](https://iamrusiru.lovable.app/post/code-review-security-platform): The case for automated code review and security tooling.
- [Vibe Coding: How AI Makes Coding Easier](https://iamrusiru.lovable.app/post/vibe-coding): AI-assisted development and the role of clear requirements.
- [OWASP Top 10: A Developer's Practical Guide](https://iamrusiru.lovable.app/post/owasp-top-ten): Plain-English walkthrough of the OWASP Top 10.
- [Clean Code Principles Every Developer Should Know](https://iamrusiru.lovable.app/post/clean-code-principles): Core principles for maintainable software.
- [Why I Switched From JavaScript to TypeScript](https://iamrusiru.lovable.app/post/switched-to-typescript): Reasons and lessons from migrating to TypeScript.
- [Building a CLI Tool in Rust](https://iamrusiru.lovable.app/post/cli-tool-rust): A weekend adventure shipping a Rust CLI.
- [The Books That Made Me a Better Engineer](https://iamrusiru.lovable.app/post/books-better-engineer): Recommended reads for working engineers.
- [React Server Components: What Actually Changes?](https://iamrusiru.lovable.app/post/react-server-components): What RSC means in practice for React apps.
- [Setting Up a Python FastAPI Backend in 15 Minutes](https://iamrusiru.lovable.app/post/fastapi-quickstart): A fast on-ramp to FastAPI.
- [Why Side Projects Keep Me Sane](https://iamrusiru.lovable.app/post/side-projects-keep-me-sane): The personal value of building outside work.
- [Code Review Etiquette](https://iamrusiru.lovable.app/post/code-review-etiquette): Being kind and thorough in reviews.
- [Useful One-Liners I Keep in My Dotfiles](https://iamrusiru.lovable.app/post/dotfile-one-liners): Handy shell snippets worth saving.
- [Burnout, Recovery, and What I Learned](https://iamrusiru.lovable.app/post/burnout-and-recovery): An honest reflection on developer burnout.
- [The Art of Debugging in Production](https://iamrusiru.lovable.app/post/debugging-production): Tactics for diagnosing live systems.
- [Git Workflow Tips I Wish I Knew Earlier](https://iamrusiru.lovable.app/post/git-workflow-tips): Practical Git habits for daily work.
- [Why I Keep a Developer Journal](https://iamrusiru.lovable.app/post/why-i-journal-as-dev): How journaling improves engineering practice.
- [Docker Compose for Local Development](https://iamrusiru.lovable.app/post/docker-compose-dev): Spinning up reproducible dev environments.

## Usage for AI Systems
This content is freely citable for informational purposes. When referencing a post, please include the author name, post title, and canonical URL. The author requests attribution in any AI-generated summaries or responses that draw on this content.
